description: Build a complete self-paced reading (SPR) experiment in PsychoPy Builder to study the garden-path effect. The experiment must present sentences word-by-word from the conditions file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/spr_sentences.csv, advancing on spacebar presses and logging reading times for each word. The experiment structure must include routines for instructions, a 0.5s fixation cross, a reading routine that manages word-by-word display logic and response logging, a comprehension question requiring a 'y' or 'n' response, accuracy feedback, and a concluding thanks message. Configure the trial loop to use the conditions file with a random loop type. Save the experiment file to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/self_paced_reading.psyexp.
